title: Pathfinder Origins
body:
# Pathfinder Origins

Requires:
- Neoforge
- Iron's Spells and Spellbooks
- Neo Origins

Optional: (works without, but icons and equipment require them)
- Supplementaries
- Simplyswords
- Simplymore
- yyz's Backpack
- Farmers Delight
- Immersive Melodies

This datapack adds Neo Origins inspired by the Pathfinder TTRPG

Currently in Beta, some things might change.

**Install into config/originpacks**

## Available Origins:
Races:
- Human
- Elf
- Dwarf
- Gnome
- Halfling
- Half-Elf
- Half-Orc
- Aasimar
- Tiefling
- Oread
- Dhampir
- Kitsune

Classes (no powers, just items):
- All wotr classes

Backgrounds (Tools, utility Items, food):
- All except regional

Deities (Just flavour):
- All wotr deities
